title: Mock HTTP test suite covers get/put error paths without a real cluster
description: tower-test mock HTTP provides deterministic test coverage of error paths (404, 403, multi-key conflicts) without needing a real Kubernetes cluster. This is the correct test strategy for a network backend: unit tests for edge cases via mocks, integration test (e2e.rs) skipped unless SECRETX_K8S_KUBECONFIG is set. A contributor might suggest removing mocks in favor of purely integration tests — that would make CI non-deterministic and require infrastructure to test basic behavior.
